description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defaults to the node:10.15.0 Docker image, defines the stages build, test, and deploy, and runs a scheduled cert-renewal job. The cert-renewal job (stage test, only on schedules) appends the stretch-backports repository to /etc/apt/sources.list, runs apt-get update, installs certbot from stretch-backports, installs git and curl, exports PATH, configures git user.name and user.email from $GITLAB_USER_LOGIN and $GITLAB_USER_EMAIL, makes ./letsencrypt_generate.sh and ./letsencrypt_authenticator.sh executable, and finally executes ./letsencrypt_generate.sh, using the variable CERTBOT_RENEWAL_GIT_TOKEN. The hexo job (stage build, only on master) runs a before_script that globally installs gulp and hexo-cli via npm, runs npm install, caches the node_modules/ directory under the key project, then builds the theme with gulp build --cwd ./themes/starter and generates the site with hexo generate, and publishes the public/ directory as an artifact. The htmlproofer job (stage test, depends on hexo, only when $CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE matches /htmlproofer/) uses the bobik/html-proofer-docker:gitlabci image and runs htmlproofer public/ with URL ignores for /fediverse.network/, /howto.disroot.org/, /f-droid.org/ and disables external checks ScriptCheck and ImageCheck. Finally, the pages job (stage deploy, depends on hexo, only on master) runs echo 'Deploying...', publishes the public/ artifact, and sets GIT_STRATEGY to none to avoid a fresh checkout.
